ruleScores.remediation: Use a customer-managed key: annotate the PVC with regionlock.io/cmk-key-id=<kms-key-id>, or use a StorageClass whose parameters set a CMK (kmsKeyId, diskEncryptionSetID, or disk-encryption-kms-key).
Declare encryption at rest: label the PVC regionlock.io/encrypted="true", or use an approved encrypted StorageClass listed in approvedStorageClasses.

ruleScores.ruleName: Workloads pinned to an EU region

articles.title: Transfers on the basis of an adequacy decision
International governmental access and transfer of non-personal data

ruleScores.remediation: Pin the workload to an in-territory region: set topology.kubernetes.io/region (via nodeSelector, or a required nodeAffinity In term on EVERY term) to one of the ruleset's allow-listed regions. On a single-region cluster, set clusterRegion instead of labelling every workload.

Keep traffic in-territory: drop Service type=ExternalName and spec.externalIPs, and replace unrestricted NetworkPolicy egress (0.0.0.0/0, ::/0, or 0.0.0.0/1 + 128.0.0.0/1 splits) with explicit in-territory CIDRs.

findings.name: orders-data
findings.message: no customer-managed key (annotation regionlock.io/cmk-key-id, or a StorageClass with a CMK parameter)
findings.remediation: Use a customer-managed key: annotate the PVC with regionlock.io/cmk-key-id=<kms-key-id>, or use a StorageClass whose parameters set a CMK (kmsKeyId, diskEncryptionSetID, or disk-encryption-kms-key).

findings.name: orders-data
findings.message: encryption at rest not declared (label/annotation regionlock.io/encrypted=true, or an encrypted StorageClass)
findings.remediation: Declare encryption at rest: label the PVC regionlock.io/encrypted="true", or use an approved encrypted StorageClass listed in approvedStorageClasses.

findings.name: allow-all-egress
findings.message: permits unrestricted egress 0.0.0.0/0 (can reach non-EU destinations)
findings.remediation: Keep traffic in-territory: drop Service type=ExternalName and spec.externalIPs, and replace unrestricted NetworkPolicy egress (0.0.0.0/0, ::/0, or 0.0.0.0/1 + 128.0.0.0/1 splits) with explicit in-territory CIDRs.

findings.name: analytics-proxy
findings.message: Service proxies to external endpoint "metrics.us-analytics.example.com" (potential extra-EU transfer)
findings.remediation: Keep traffic in-territory: drop Service type=ExternalName and spec.externalIPs, and replace unrestricted NetworkPolicy egress (0.0.0.0/0, ::/0, or 0.0.0.0/1 + 128.0.0.0/1 splits) with explicit in-territory CIDRs.

findings.name: legacy-billing

findings.remediation: Keep traffic in-territory: drop Service type=ExternalName and spec.externalIPs, and replace unrestricted NetworkPolicy egress (0.0.0.0/0, ::/0, or 0.0.0.0/1 + 128.0.0.0/1 splits) with explicit in-territory CIDRs.

findings.name: unrestricted-egress
findings.message: permits egress to any destination (egress rule with no peer selector)
findings.remediation: Keep traffic in-territory: drop Service type=ExternalName and spec.externalIPs, and replace unrestricted NetworkPolicy egress (0.0.0.0/0, ::/0, or 0.0.0.0/1 + 128.0.0.0/1 splits) with explicit in-territory CIDRs.
